query:
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as project_count,
  SUM(
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c WHERE c.project = p.name AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.emailVerified = 0))
  ) as contacts_missing_email
FROM projects p
WHERE p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
GROUP BY p.priority
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm');
